regional_cost_note: Cladding installers in Queenstown typically charge $125–$190/m² for primed pine weatherboard, $105–$170/m² for fibre cement, and $190–$295/m² for brick veneer. Queenstown commands premium pricing due to high demand and a tight local labour market. Weathertightness is critical — use only licensed builders for restricted building work on cladding.
